properties.Test Case: French (Target: extended ASCII composed characters; letters define stages):
properties.Steps: French (Target: extended ASCII composed characters; letters define stages):

properties.Test Case: From installed French DR/LR source, make a derivative of "French DR". Mimimal Test procedure: 1) Progressively move from page to page, observe and verify. For pages 1-13, each page should contain no highlighted words if the corresponding Stage is set, e.g. page 5 will show no highlighted words if stage is set to 5. Exceptions: Page 14 requires stage 11, & page 15 requires stage 12. ‌ 2) Try adding 2 or 3 sight words to a stage which would not otherwise be acceptable for that stage, and ensure these words are not highlighted if added to a page. 3) Remove diagraph "ch" from Letters, then on page 1 add the word "cha". Set stage to 1. "cha" should not be highlighted.
properties.Steps:
- From installed French DR/LR source, make a derivative of "French DR". Mimimal Test procedure:
  1) Progressively move from page to page, observe and verify. For pages 1-13, each page should contain no highlighted words if the corresponding Stage is set, e.g. page 5 will show no highlighted words if stage is set to 5. Exceptions: Page 14 requires stage 11, & page 15 requires stage 12.
‌  2) Try adding 2 or 3 sight words to a stage which would not otherwise be acceptable for that stage, and ensure these words are not highlighted if added to a page.
  3) Remove diagraph "ch" from Letters, then on page 1 add the word "cha". Set stage to 1. "cha" should not be highlighted.

properties.Test Case: From installed French DR/LR source, make a derivative of "Stage 5". Book should be A4 Landscape. DR stage should be 5. On page 1, click on Gear icon. Message should say Sorry.... Type 2 short paragraphs on page 1. The images on that page indicate the formatting characteristics that should apply.
properties.Steps:
- From installed French DR/LR source, make a derivative of "Stage 5". Book should be A4 Landscape. DR stage should be 5.
  On page 1, click on Gear icon. Message should say Sorry.... 
  Type 2 short paragraphs on page 1. The images on that page indicate the formatting characteristics that should apply.

properties.Test Case: Make a derivative of "LR1: Levels 1-3 Word Lengths". For page 1-3, change level to match the image and verify word highlighting and LR stats. On page 3, stats for "This book" should match (1) in this image; duplicate page 3, now stats should match (2) Page 4-6 contain no text which should not affect the stats. Deleting these pages should have no affect on the stats. Optional tests: add/delete words, etc.
properties.Steps:
- Make a derivative of "LR1: Levels 1-3 Word Lengths". 
  For page 1-3, change level to match the image and verify word highlighting and LR stats.
  On page 3, stats for "This book" should match (1) in this image; duplicate page 3, now stats should match (2)  
  Page 4-6 contain no text which should not affect the stats. Deleting these pages should have no affect on the stats. Optional tests: add/delete words, etc.

properties.Test Case: Make a derivative of "LR2: Level 4-6Words in Sentences". Follow instructions page.
